text:
Created attachment 253754
www/py-mov-cli

mov-cli is a command-line tool that allows you to stream media
from your terminalusing plugins. It handles metadata, configuration
and scraping of media to be streamed in your preferred media player.

https://github.com/mov-cli/mov-cli

This package does depend on other packages, i'll add them later.
